step_by_step_reasoning: We identify three main user groups: Data Scientist, ML Engineer, and Mobile client (represented as UserConsumerMobile). We map the Model Registry to SageMaker's ModelRegistry. The custom EXAMT tool is composed of API Gateway and Step Functions, drawn as separate XAMD boxes in each of the three accounts (Data Science, QA, Production); we map these to StepFunctions nodes. The QA and Prod endpoints are mapped to SageMaker nodes. The edges represent the flow of model registration, QA deployment triggering and artifact fetching, production deployment triggering and artifact promotion, and finally inference requests from the mobile client.

graph.name: BASF Digital Farming: Cross-Account Model Deployment
graph.notes: Custom serverless deployment tool (EXAMT) using API Gateway and Step Functions to promote SageMaker ML models securely across Data Science, QA, and Production accounts.

nodes.name: EXAMT (DS)
nodes.notes: Deployment workflow in Data Science account.

nodes.name: EXAMT (QA)
nodes.notes: Orchestrates deployment to the QA account.

nodes.name: QA Endpoint
nodes.notes: SageMaker endpoint for load and accuracy testing.

nodes.name: EXAMT (Prod)
nodes.notes: Orchestrates deployment to the Production account.

nodes.name: ML Engineer
nodes.notes: Triggers model progression through different stages.

nodes.name: Mobile Client
nodes.notes: Xavio Scouting app used by farmers.

edges.notes: Triggers notifications in Data Science account
Invokes deployment API to deploy to QA
Fetches model artifacts from Data Science account to QA
Invokes deployment API to deploy to Prod
Fetches model artifacts from QA account to Prod
